_async_note: RESOLVED — this is a Promise<string | null>. The adapter MUST await it. Without await you get an unresolved Promise object.

on_open_page._note: After opening an existing page ('task/action') and awaiting — returns that page's uid string

on_dnp._note: On a Daily Notes Page the awaited uid is in MM-DD-YYYY form (per util.dateToPageUid). Inferred from DNP uid format; not separately captured.

on_log_view_or_boot._note: Awaited result was null when no concrete page was open (scrolling daily-log view / boot state)

_shape.string_when: a concrete page/block is open in the main window
_shape.null_when: daily-log view or no page resolved
